query: SELECT id, teamAName, teamBName, scoreA, scoreB, aiSummary IS NOT NULL as hasAiSummary, goalsTimeline IS NOT NULL as hasGoalsTimeline, matchStatistics IS NOT NULL as hasMatchStats FROM games WHERE status = 'finished' LIMIT 5;
